title: OrbitGrasp: SE(3)-Equivariant Grasp Learning
abstract: While grasp detection is an important part of any robotic manipulation pipeline, reliable and accurate grasp detection in $\\mathrm{SE}(3)$ remains a research challenge. Many robotics applications in unstructured environments such as the home or warehouse would benefit a lot from better grasp performance. This paper proposes a novel framework for detecting $\mathrm{SE}(3)$ grasp poses based on point cloud input. Our main contribution is to propose an $\mathrm{SE}(3)$-equivariant model that maps each point in the cloud to a continuous grasp quality function over the 2-sphere $S^2$ using a spherical harmonic basis. Compared with reasoning about a finite set of samples, this formulation improves the accuracy and efficiency of our model when a large number of samples would otherwise be needed. In order to accomplish this, we propose a novel variation on EquiFormerV2 that leverages a UNet-style backbone to enlarge the number of points the model can handle. Our resulting method, which we name OrbitGrasp, significantly outperforms baselines in both simulation and physical experiments.
abstract_zh: 抓取检测是机器人操作流程中的重要组成部分，但在SE(3)空间中实现可靠且准确的抓取检测仍是一个研究挑战。许多非结构化环境（如家庭或仓库）中的机器人应用将极大受益于更好的抓取性能。本文提出了一种基于点云输入检测SE(3)抓取姿态的新框架。我们的主要贡献是提出一个SE(3)-等变模型，该模型利用球谐基将点云中的每个点映射到二维球面S^2上的连续抓取质量函数。与考虑有限样本集相比，这种表述在需要大量样本时提高了模型的准确性和效率。为此，我们提出了EquiFormerV2的一种新变体，它采用UNet风格的主干网络来扩大模型可处理的点数。我们的方法名为OrbitGrasp，在仿真和物理实验中均显著优于基线方法。
tldr_zh: 提出SE(3)-等变模型，用球谐基实现连续抓取质量函数，提升抓取检测精度与效率。
cover_zh: 抓取检测新突破｜连续函数替代离散采样，精度效率双提升
